title: Fix test suite — get critical tests passing
description: PRD gap: test suite has ~36 failures. Focus on critical path tests: (1) Run full test suite, identify failures, (2) Fix broken imports/stale references from recent refactors (engine registry, fallback cleanup, dead file removal), (3) Target: core module tests pass (llm, stt, tts, brain, hub, api). Do NOT write new tests — fix existing broken ones.
